full_text:
Rui Xuan (Wenbiao) 芮玄 (文表)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Rui Xuan (芮玄), styledWenbiao (文表), was born in Danyang. Succeeded his brother’s position and was made Marquis of Liyang. Rui Xuan was affiliated with the Wu Kingdom.
